extortion.description: itgsoftware.com ITG Software, Inc. is a provider of mission critical integrated business software solutions. Using a rigorous design approach, we build integrated software systems that will have a marked positive effect on the bottom line. Infinite Tiers Group, Inc. has a unique approach to building software systems. This stems from our understanding of the usability and applicability of current technology as well as our vision of what's next. We are committed to providing the highest quality
